semantics:
  name: Measured Value
  clause: 3.2.2
  definition: 1 平面控制测量应采用卫星定位测量、导线测量、三角测量或三边测量方法进行. 2平面控制测量等级与技术要求应符合表3.2. 2-1 的规定.
    表:22平面控制测量等级与技术要求 测量 最募点点位中误差 最竭相邻点相对点位最翡相邻点边长相对相邻点间平均边长 公路级 等级 (mm) 中误差氧（mm)
    中误差 参照值 (m) 高速级公路 一级 ±50 ± 30 <=
  standard_reference: JTG F80/1-2017
  test_method: ''
  frequency: ''
logic:
  inputs:
  - name: measured_value
    type: number
    unit: ''
    required: true
  path:
  - op: passthrough
    id: step_1
    input: measured_value
    output: measured_value
  gate:
  - condition: measured_value in [2..1]
    action: BLOCK
    message: measured_value does not satisfy measured_value in [2..1]
    severity: critical
  state:
    initial: CHECK_PENDING
    transitions:
    - from: CHECK_PENDING
      true: PASS
      to: QUALIFIED
    - from: CHECK_PENDING
      true: BLOCK
      to: REJECTED
    - from: CHECK_PENDING
      true: CRITICAL
      to: REJECTED
    - from: CHECK_PENDING
      true: WARNING
      to: MANUAL_REVIEW
    - from: MANUAL_REVIEW
      true: PASS
      to: QUALIFIED
    - from: MANUAL_REVIEW
      true: BLOCK
      to: REJECTED
    terminal:
    - QUALIFIED
    - REJECTED
proof:
  anchors:
  - name: raw_input
    required: true
  - name: normalized_input
    required: true
  - name: path_outputs

  - name: gate_result

  definition: 1 导线测量精度应符合表3.2.2-3的规定. 2 原有导线点不能满足施工需要时,应增设满足相应精度要求的附合导线点. 3 同一建设项目内相邻施工段的导线应闭合,并满足同等级精度要求.
    4 可能受施工影响的导线点,施工前应加固或改移,并应保持其精度. 5 导线桩点应进行不定期检查和定期复测,复测周期应不超过6个月.
  standard_reference: JTG F80/1-2017
  test_method: ''
  frequency: ''

    required: true

    output: measured_value

  - condition: measured_value in [2.2..3]
    action: BLOCK
    message: measured_value does not satisfy measured_value in [2.2..3]
    severity: critical

    - from: MANUAL_REVIEW

    - from: MANUAL_REVIEW
      true: BLOCK
      to: REJECTED

    - QUALIFIED
    - REJECTED
